sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66748" key="metalgh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταλγ-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n66748.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bringing sorrow in its train</tr_>, prob. l., ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg001.perseus-grc1:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope> </bibl> (lyr.).</sense> </entryFree>
